goal: subring_subset[R](a, b) = forall(x0: R) { a.contains(x0) implies b.contains(x0) }
proof: function[T0: Ring](x0: Subring[T0], x1: Subring[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = subring_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[R](a, b)
(forall(x0: R) { not x0 ∈ a or x0 ∈ b } = true)
function(x0: R) { not (x0 ∈ a and not x0 ∈ b) }(x)
let w0: R satisfy { w0 ∈ a and not w0 ∈ b }
function(x0: R) { not x0 ∈ a or x0 ∈ b }(w0)
let w0: R satisfy { w0 ∈ a and not w0 ∈ b }
function(x0: R) { not x0 ∈ a or x0 ∈ b }(w0)
function[T0: Ring](x0: Subring[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.as_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[R](a, x)
function[T0: Ring](x0: Subring[T0], x1: Subring[T0]) { not x0.as_set ⊂ x1.as_set or subring_subset[T0](x0, x1) }[R](a, b)
